project_name: Soul Karma by Gitika Sharma - Modern Redesign
design_philosophy: Elegant, mystical, and grounded. The aesthetic blends cosmic/astrology themes with modern luxury wellness. Uses bento grids for structured content, generous negative space, and organic textures.

layout_and_spacing.grid_style: Bento Grid for Services (gap-6 or gap-8), Cards have p-8 padding

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Subtle -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, and image scale transform (scale-105) inside overflow-hidden wrappers.
interactions_and_motion.buttons: Solid primary background with white text, tracking-wider. Or outline buttons with thin gold border.
interactions_and_motion.glassmorphism: Used for sticky header and booking/checkout modals. Must have 1px subtle inner border (border-white/40).

components_needed.name: Header
components_needed.details: Sticky top, Glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border_color/50). Logo left, links center, Cart button right.

components_needed.name: HeroSection
components_needed.details: Full height (min-h-[80vh]). Abstract sand background image behind with dark overlay (bg-black/30) to make white serif text pop. Headline: 'Where the universe whispers its secrets'.

components_needed.name: AboutSection
components_needed.details: Asymmetric split layout. Large image on left (about-img-1), generous spacing. Elegant typography on right.

components_needed.name: ServicesSection
components_needed.details: 3-column grid. Each card has an image, title, and 'Book Appointment' button. Clicking opens BookingModal.

components_needed.name: BookingModal
components_needed.details: Shadcn Dialog. Shows selected service. Uses react-day-picker for calendar. Shows list of available time slots upon date selection. Confirm button triggers sonner toast 'Appointment Confirmed'.

components_needed.name: CoursesSection
components_needed.details: E-commerce styled grid for courses. Price displayed clearly. 'Add to Cart' button.

components_needed.name: CartDrawer
components_needed.details: Right-side Sheet component. Order summary, total amount, 'Checkout' button. Checkout triggers sonner toast 'Order Placed'.

components_needed.name: TestimonialsCarousel
components_needed.details: Subtle cards with soft quotes, using Cormorant Garamond italic for the quote text.

components_needed.name: Footer
components_needed.details: Dark background (surface_dark), gold text accents. Large 'Soul Karma' brand text. Newsletter input.

testing.instructions: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, modal triggers) MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, e.g., data-testid='book-service-kundali', data-testid='add-to-cart-bhrigu', data-testid='cart-checkout-button'.

images.description: Abstract wave sand pattern for hero background.
Intricate golden wave pattern for course section backgrounds.

development_instructions: Ensure you are using JavaScript (not TypeScript) as requested in the critical rules. Use Lucide-react for standard icons, but feel free to install phosphor-icons/react if more elegant duotone styling is needed. Do not use generic fonts like Inter. Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Outfit' for body. Implement a cart state in React (Context or simple state) to allow adding to cart and displaying the count in the header. Mock the checkout and booking flows using sonner toasts.
